model_comparison: Model 1 followed the user's specific instruction to use a 'low pitch' (低音), generating a deep, resonant male voice that perfectly fits the description. Model 2 ignored the pitch constraint entirely, generating a standard female voice with a medium-to-high pitch. While both models produced fluent and accurate speech content, Model 1 is the clear winner because it adhered to the specific paralinguistic control command, whereas Model 2 did not.
